name: Question
about: Ask a question about using or understanding QST
title: "[Question] "
labels: question

---

## Before Asking

Please check whether your question is already answered in:

- [`docs/26_PROJECT_GLOSSARY.md`](../../docs/26_PROJECT_GLOSSARY.md) — for terminology questions (e.g., "what is QBER?").
- [`docs/22_MATHEMATICAL_FOUNDATION.md`](../../docs/22_MATHEMATICAL_FOUNDATION.md) — for questions about the underlying quantum mechanics/BB84 theory.
- The relevant `specs/*.md` file — for questions about how a specific component works or is meant to behave.

**Consider using [GitHub Discussions](../../discussions) instead of an issue for open-ended questions** — Discussions are better suited for back-and-forth conversation, while issues are best for a specific, answerable question tied to the project.

## Your Question

Please be as specific as possible.

## Context

What are you trying to do? (e.g., "I'm trying to understand why QBER approaches 25% rather than 50% when Eve intercepts every qubit.")
